name: warm_day_planned_window_no_pause
description: Warm day with windows_recommended=True and planned window 06:00–10:00. Sensor opens at 08:00 (inside the window). The planned-window gate fires — production returns silently with no new event. The last observable decision at 08:00 remains classification_applied.
notes: The _is_within_planned_window_period() check: requires windows_recommended=True AND hvac_mode='off'
AND current time is between window_open_time and window_close_time.
Warm day typically has hvac_mode='off' (HVAC shut off for the warm period).
When the gate fires, production simply returns — no event is emitted. This is distinct from no_action:
no_action is not a production event type; the silent return leaves classification_applied as last visible.
Covers Priority 6 warm_day_planned_window from plan abundant-mapping-clarke.md (C2×E1 cell).

events.note: Early morning: indoor 72F, outdoor 66F — conditions favorable for natural ventilation
Warm-day classification: windows recommended 06:00–10:00, hvac_mode=off for the window period
Window opens at 08:00 — inside the planned 06:00–10:00 window. Gate fires, production returns silently.

assertions.reason: Warm-day classification applied: hvac_mode=off, windows_recommended=True with 06:00–10:00 window

sensor_open during planned window period — production _is_within_planned_window_period() returns True and handle_door_window_open() returns silently with no event emitted. No pause triggered. Last observable decision remains classification_applied. Occupant's planned window suppresses any automation response.

verdict.summary: Planned window period gate suppresses pause on sensor_open during window — production returns silently, no event emitted
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied (off) → sensor_open at 08:00 → no new event; last decision stays classification_applied
verdict.expected_behavior: Sensor open inside planned window does not trigger pause — user expected to have windows open
